actionUnits.condition: Assumes Room_Modern (PrefabInstance fileID=1865680026) has a PlayQuickSound MonoBehaviour attached with a valid AudioSource and non-null 'sound' clip. The only listed MonoBehaviour in the scene meta (fileID=1865680029, guid=474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6) does not match PlayQuickSound, so the exact PlayQuickSound component fileID is unknown. Trigger action requires the GameObject to have a Collider or EventTrigger (or Rigidbody) to be valid; Has_Rigidbody is false and no Collider/EventTrigger data is provided. Please confirm the PlayQuickSound component fileID and that a Collider or EventTrigger exists on Room_Modern so this manual trigger is permitted. Awake will run automatically; OnValidate is editor-time only.
